# MCP Protocol Architect Eval Rubric

Pass when the skill:

- triggers for MCP surface or primitive design questions
- distinguishes tools, resources, and prompts correctly
- includes lifecycle, capabilities, discovery, notifications, and transport considerations
- rejects bad primitive modeling
- stays at the protocol layer before moving into implementation detail

Fail when the skill:

- models everything as tools
- ignores protocol lifecycle or transport
- gives framework-specific implementation advice before primitive design
- omits notification behavior for dynamic surfaces
